About

👋 Hi, I’m Hyomin - a content marketer and researcher based in Seoul with 7 years of experience in the K-Pop industry. My focus area for the past few years has been content marketing, but I’m also skilled in service design.

Ever since I first learned how to make advertising materials while designing an online dance class service for K-Pop enthusiasts, I have pursued marketing as a passion, and as a career. Check out my portfolio for more information on my other projects (including more marketing materials!), as well as some of my writing.

RESEARCH INTERESTS

Human-Computer Interaction, Learning Sciences, Design Research, Online Learning Experience, Media Production, Embodied Movement, and Accessibility. I am interested in exploring how to design technology for improving online learning experiences in embodied movement (e.g., dance, yoga, fitness).

EDUCATION

Sep 2024-
M.S. in Education (Learning Sciences Concentration), Northwestern University
Evanston, IL, United States

Feb 2016
B.S. in Business Administration, Hanyang University
Seoul, Korea
